kw.name: Open Application
kw.doc: Opens the application with enhanced browser configuration

kw.name: Validate Environment
kw.doc: Validates if environment configuration is correct

kw.name: Dictionary Should Contain Key
kw.doc: Fails if ``key`` is not found from ``dictionary``.

kw.name: Should Not Be Empty
kw.doc: Verifies that the given item is not empty.

kw.name: Log
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.

kw.name: Get Environment URL
kw.doc: Returns URL based on current environment

kw.name: Get From Dictionary
kw.doc: Returns a value from the given ``dictionary`` based on the given ``key``.

kw.name: Log
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.

kw.name: Evaluate
kw.doc: Evaluates the given expression in Python and returns the result.

kw.name: Run Keyword If
kw.doc: Runs the given keyword with the given arguments, if ``condition`` is true.

kw.name: Call Method
kw.doc: Calls the named method of the given object with the provided arguments.

kw.name: Call Method
kw.doc: Calls the named method of the given object with the provided arguments.

kw.name: Call Method
kw.doc: Calls the named method of the given object with the provided arguments.

kw.doc: Calls the named method of the given object with the provided arguments.

kw.name: Call Method
kw.doc: Calls the named method of the given object with the provided arguments.

kw.name: Open Browser
kw.doc: Opens a new browser instance to the optional ``url``.

kw.name: Maximize Browser Window
kw.doc: Maximizes current browser window.

kw.name: Set Selenium Implicit Wait
kw.doc: Sets the implicit wait value used by Selenium.

kw.name: Set Selenium Timeout
kw.doc: Sets the timeout that is used by various keywords.

kw.name: Setup Test Environment
kw.doc: Setup test environment directories and logging

kw.name: Create Directory
kw.doc: Creates the specified directory.

kw.name: Create Directory
kw.doc: Creates the specified directory.

kw.name: Create Directory
kw.doc: Creates the specified directory.

kw.name: Log
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.

kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.

kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.

kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.

test.name: TC002_Generate_Receipt_Only

kw.name: Load Test Data From JSON
kw.doc: Loads test data from JSON file with error handling

kw.name: Join Path
kw.doc: Joins the given path part(s) to the given base path.

kw.name: File Should Exist
kw.doc: Fails unless the given ``path`` points to an existing file.

kw.name: Get File
kw.doc: Returns the contents of a specified file.

kw.name: Evaluate
kw.doc: Evaluates the given expression in Python and returns the result.

kw.name: Log
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.

kw.name: Get From Dictionary
kw.doc: Returns a value from the given ``dictionary`` based on the given ``key``.

kw.name: Get From Dictionary
kw.doc: Returns a value from the given ``dictionary`` based on the given ``key``.

kw.name: Generate Receipt Only
kw.doc: Generates receipt without approval

kw.name: Login To Application
kw.doc: Complete login process with Re-Login handling

kw.name: Handle Re-Login If Present
kw.doc: Handles Re-Login button if it appears

kw.name: Run Keyword And Return Status
kw.doc: Runs the given keyword with given arguments and returns the status as a Boolean value.

kw.name: Element Should Be Visible
kw.doc: Verifies that the element identified by ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Run Keyword If
kw.doc: Runs the given keyword with the given arguments, if ``condition`` is true.

kw.name: Run Keyword If
kw.doc: Runs the given keyword with the given arguments, if ``condition`` is true.

kw.name: Enter Username
kw.doc: Enters username in the login field

kw.name: Wait For Element And Input Text
kw.doc: Enhanced text input with validation

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Enabled
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is enabled.

kw.name: Clear Element Text
kw.doc: Clears the value of the text-input-element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: Convert To String
kw.doc: Converts the given item to a Unicode string.

kw.name: Get Length
kw.doc: Returns and logs the length of the given item as an integer.

kw.name: Run Keyword If
kw.doc: Runs the given keyword with the given arguments, if ``condition`` is true.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: Log
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.

kw.name: Run Keyword And Return Status
kw.doc: Runs the given keyword with given arguments and returns the status as a Boolean value.

kw.name: Run Keywords
kw.doc: Executes all the given keywords in a sequence.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Enabled
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is enabled.

kw.name: Click Element
kw.doc: Click the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Exit For Loop If
kw.doc: Stops executing the enclosing FOR loop if the ``condition`` is true.

kw.name: Run Keyword If
kw.doc: Runs the given keyword with the given arguments, if ``condition`` is true.

kw.name: Run Keyword Unless
kw.arg: Failed to click element ${locator} after ${retry_count} attempts
kw.doc: *DEPRECATED since RF 5.0. Use Native IF/ELSE or `Run Keyword If` instead.*

kw.name: Wait For Loading To Complete
kw.doc: Wait for loading indicators to disappear

kw.name: Run Keyword And Return Status
kw.arg: Wait Until Element Is Not Visible
kw.doc: Runs the given keyword with given arguments and returns the status as a Boolean value.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Not Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is not visible.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: Wait For Page Load
kw.doc: Enhanced page load waiting with multiple checks

kw.name: Wait For Condition
kw.doc: Waits until ``condition`` is true or ``timeout`` expires.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.
